message:
test(engine): comprehensive test enrichment across 32 core modules (~10k lines)

Adds deep edge-case, sensitivity, clone/serde round-trip, and boundary
condition tests to 32 modules spanning the engine's security, policy,
observability, parser, and governance subsystems. This batch focuses on
strengthening invariant coverage before release gating.

Modules enriched (sorted by lines added):

Security & Capability:
- adversarial_campaign.rs (+700): campaign generator Debug derive + full
  coverage of suppression/comparison/event pipelines
- capability_witness.rs (+707): publication pipeline error paths, witness
  chain sensitivity, serde edge cases
- obstruction_certificate.rs (+480): certificate composition, evidence
  chain validation, serialization determinism
- supervision.rs (+340): escalation chains, boundary conditions, concurrent
  supervisor state transitions

Policy & Control:
- demotion_rollback.rs (+529): performance thresholds, monitoring
  observations, independent policy checks, rollback sequencing
- policy_controller.rs (+335): posterior/action selection edge cases,
  boundary conditions, determinism verification
- incentive_governance_mechanism.rs (+343): serde edges, Display impls,
  boundary values, stress-test edge cases
- epoch_barrier.rs (+239): force cancel edge cases, guard lifecycle,
  high epoch values, concurrent barrier interaction
- obligation_leak_policy.rs (+240): isolation, stress, special chars,
  handler semantics, leak detection thresholds

Parser & Serialization:
- parser_multi_engine_harness.rs (+618): quantile edge cases, multi-engine
  comparison determinism, harness configuration validation
- parser.rs (+509): parse_quoted_string edge cases, batch 2 enrichment,
  escape sequence handling, Unicode boundary cases
- specialization_index.rs (+248): clone, stress, boundary, reverse audit,
  invalidation query edge cases

Infrastructure & Analytics:
- frankentui_adapter.rs (+1094): PearlTower helper function coverage,
  adapter state machine, render pipeline edge cases
- interleaving_explorer.rs (+208): clone, edge cases, JSON presence, Verdict
- evidence_emission.rs (+210): clone, serde, boundary, mid-stream epoch
- evidence_ordering.rs (+188): boundary conditions, duplicate witness removal
- spectral_fleet_convergence.rs (+201): non-uniform weights, graph topology
- gc_pause.rs (+191): ring buffer edge cases, percentile boundaries, budget
- alloc_domain.rs (+186): clone equality, ordering, JSON fields, edge cases
- frankenlab_extension_lifecycle.rs (+176): clone, failure accumulation
- marker_stream.rs (+169): clone, determinism, field presence, edge cases
- dp_budget_accountant.rs (+167): operation IDs, epoch summaries, negatives
- northstar_scorecard.rs (+163): milestone ordering, serde roundtrip
- checkpoint.rs (+167): checkpoint lifecycle edge cases
- region_lifecycle.rs (+166): clone, JSON fields, finalize results
- reproducibility_provenance_pack.rs (+166): clone, serde, license findings
- containment_executor.rs (+156): receipt fields, serde, state transitions
- declassification_pipeline.rs (+161): clone, serde, determinism, stats
- remote_capability_gate.rs (+231): counters, serde, clone, display
- canonical_encoding.rs (+140): multiple domains, drain events, schema edges
- ambient_authority.rs (+141): line-specific exemptions, edge cases
- security_epoch.rs (+141): clone, JSON fields, std::error, hash, edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
